DP.241.0000:
That Pokémon you met was the
Lunar Pokémon...\f
I’ve heard tales of it flying from
place to place throughout Sinnoh.\f
Oh! That sparkle...
So, that’s the Lunar Wing...\f
Thank you... That will wake my son
from the nightmare...\f
DP.241.0001: Should we sail back to Canalave?
DP.241.0003:
All right, then. Tell me if you’d like
to return to Canalave.
